title: I am 56, single, and renewing my $400,000 10-year term life policy. Am I making a huge mistake?
summary: A 56-year-old faces renewal of a $400,000 term life insurance policy, questioning whether it remains necessary given no dependent beneficiaries. The case illustrates insurance industry requirements for insurable interest and challenges for single policyholders.
content: “The agent said he could not add my brother because he does not depend on my income, so has no insurable interest.”

zh.title: 我56岁、单身，正在续保40万美元10年定期人寿保险。这是个大错误吗？
zh.summary: 一位56岁的人面临续保40万美元定期人寿保险的问题，在没有受益人的情况下质疑其必要性。该案例说明了保险业对可保利益的要求以及单身投保人面临的挑战。

title: Arm's quarter shows how it's carving a lucrative path in the crowded CPU resurgence
summary: Arm's earnings results demonstrate its success in the resurging CPU market alongside competitors Intel and AMD. The company is establishing itself as a significant player in data-center processors, reflecting broader industry trends toward specialized chip design.
content: This central processing unit renaissance was confirmed when Intel reported earnings two weeks ago. AMD and now Arm told similar stories.

zh.title: Arm的季度业绩展示了它如何在拥挤的CPU复兴中开辟盈利道路
zh.summary: Arm的财报结果展示了它在CPU市场复兴中与英特尔和AMD等竞争对手的成功。该公司在数据中心处理器领域确立了自己的重要地位，反映了整个行业向专业化芯片设计发展的趋势。

title: Gulf economies face long-term hit from Iran conflict
summary: Gulf region economies face sustained economic damage from Iran-related conflicts that could require years or decades to repair. The impact reflects broader geopolitical instability affecting regional trade, investment, and economic growth.
content: Commentators say it will take years or even decades to repair the damage.

zh.title: 海湾经济体因伊朗冲突面临长期打击
zh.summary: 海湾地区经济体面临伊朗相关冲突造成的持续经济损害，可能需要数年甚至数十年才能修复。这种影响反映了地缘政治不稳定性对地区贸易、投资和经济增长的影响。

title: 'We had people come just to see it': Amazon delivers its first UK parcels by drone
summary: Amazon successfully launched drone delivery in the UK, with unmanned aircraft capable of dropping 100 parcels daily within a 12km radius. The milestone represents a major advancement in autonomous logistics for major retailers.
content: The unmanned aircraft can drop off 100 parcels a day within a 12km radius of Amazon's hub.

zh.title: "人们只是为了看它来的"：亚马逊通过无人机完成首次英国包裹投递
zh.summary: 亚马逊成功在英国推出无人机投递服务，无人机能够在12公里半径范围内日均投递100件包裹。这一里程碑代表了主要零售商自主物流技术的重大进步。

title: Restaurants really don’t want to sell fake meat — and Beyond Meat is suffering
summary: Beyond Meat's stock declined further after issuing weak guidance as restaurants show limited appetite for plant-based meat products. The company's planned expansion into protein drinks highlights its struggle in its core market.
content: Beyond Meat’s stock fell further Wednesday after it offered a weak forecast, and as it prepares to move further into a crowded protein-drink market.

zh.title: 餐厅真的不想销售人造肉——Beyond Meat陷入困境
zh.summary: Beyond Meat股价进一步下跌，此前该公司发布了疲弱的前景指引，而餐厅对植物性肉类产品的兴趣有限。该公司计划扩展到蛋白质饮料市场，凸显了其在核心市场的困难。

title: Warner Bros. Discovery books $2.9 billion net loss tied to Paramount deal, restructuring costs
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery recorded a $2.9 billion net loss largely due to accounting costs from its Paramount acquisition, including a Netflix termination fee. The charges underscore the financial impact of major media consolidation moves.
content: Paramount agreed to pay a Netflix termination fee, but the cost lives on WBD's books until the close of the deal.

zh.title: 华纳兄弟发现公司因派拉蒙交易和重组成本录得29亿美元净亏损
zh.summary: 华纳兄弟发现公司录得29亿美元净亏损，主要源于派拉蒙收购的会计成本，包括Netflix终止费。这些费用凸显了重大媒体整合举措的财务影响。

title: Jim Cramer says Big Tech cannot afford to be cheap on AI spending
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer argued that major cloud computing companies must maintain aggressive investment in artificial intelligence infrastructure or risk competitive disadvantage. The commentary reflects industry consensus on the necessity of substantial AI spending for tech leaders.
content: Cloud computing giants cannot afford to pinch pennies on the artificial intelligence buildout, CNBC's Jim Cramer argued Wednesday.

zh.title: 吉姆·克拉默说科技巨头不能在AI支出上抠门
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克拉默辩称，主要云计算公司必须维持对人工智能基础设施的积极投资，否则会面临竞争劣势。这一评论反映了业界共识，即科技领导者需要大幅增加AI支出。

title: Traders point to suspicious activity in the oil market on Wednesday
summary: Oil contracts worth $1.7 billion traded unusually heavily in the hour before an Axios report that moved prices lower, prompting scrutiny of market manipulation. The incident raises questions about oil market transparency and potential coordinated trading.
content: Oil contracts worth $1.7 billion changed hands in the hour before an Axios report sent oil prices lower Wednesday. Some experts are calling the spike in activity suspicious.

zh.title: 交易者指出周三油市存在可疑活动
zh.summary: 价值17亿美元的石油合约在推动油价下跌的Axios报告发布前一小时内交易异常活跃，引发了市场操纵的审查。这一事件引起了人们对油市透明度和潜在协调交易的质疑。

title: Anthropic CEO says 80-fold growth in first quarter explains 'difficulties with compute'
summary: Anthropic's CEO Dario Amodei attributed compute challenges to explosive 80-fold Q1 growth, while pledging to accelerate infrastructure scaling. The statement reveals operational demands of rapid AI company growth and critical resource constraints in the field.
content: At Anthropic's developer conference in San Francisco, CEO Dario Amodei said the company is 'working as quickly as possible' to provide additional compute.

zh.title: Anthropic首席执行官称第一季度80倍增长解释了"计算困难"
zh.summary: Anthropic首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代将计算挑战归因于第一季度的爆炸性80倍增长，同时承诺加快基础设施扩展。该声明揭示了快速增长的人工智能公司的运营需求和该领域的关键资源约束。

title: Snap issues cautious guidance as Perplexity deal ends, Middle East 'geopolitical situation' causes uncertainty
summary: Snap reported first-quarter earnings with cautious forward guidance, citing the end of its Perplexity partnership and Middle East geopolitical uncertainty as headwinds. The company's conservative outlook reflects multiple business challenges beyond traditional advertiser demand.
content: Snap reported first-quarter earnings and provided cautious sales guidance while revealing it no longer has a deal with the generative AI startup Perplexity.

zh.title: Snap发布谨慎指引，Perplexity交易结束，中东"地缘政治局势"引发不确定性
zh.summary: Snap公布了第一季度收益，给出了谨慎的前瞻指引，理由是Perplexity合作伙伴关系的结束和中东地缘政治不确定性带来的阻力。该公司的保守前景反映了超越传统广告商需求的多重商业挑战。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: AMD, Corning, Arm Holdings, Cencora, Uber & more
summary: Multiple stocks including AMD, Corning, Arm Holdings, Cencora, and Uber are showing significant price movement in midday trading. The article highlights key intraday market shifts across major technology and consumer sectors.
content: Here are the stocks making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 股票在中午出现最大波动：AMD、康宁、Arm Holdings、Cencora、优步等
zh.summary: 包括AMD、康宁、Arm Holdings、Cencora和优步在内的多只股票在中午交易中显示出重大价格波动。该文章突出了主要技术和消费部门的关键日内市场变化。

title: Airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in month after Iran war started, U.S. government says
summary: U.S. airlines increased jet fuel spending by 56.4% in March compared to February, according to government data released Wednesday. The spike correlates with escalations in the Iran conflict, which drove up global oil prices and airline operating costs.
content: U.S. airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in March than they did in February, U.S. government data released Wednesday shows.

zh.title: 美国政府称伊朗战争开始后一个月航空公司喷气燃料支出增加56.4%
zh.summary: 根据周三发布的政府数据，美国航空公司3月的喷气燃料支出较2月增加了56.4%。这一飙升与伊朗冲突的升级相关，推高了全球油价和航空公司的运营成本。

title: Marco Rubio heads to the Vatican as 2028 presidential buzz ramps up
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio visited the Vatican amid speculation about a potential 2028 presidential run to succeed President Trump. Rubio is viewed as a frontrunner for the Republican nomination, though Vice President JD Vance is also considered a likely successor.
content: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is a frontrunner to succeed President Donald Trump in 2028, though Vice President JD Vance is also seen as a potential heir.

zh.title: 2028年总统热议升温之际，马克·鲁比奥前往梵蒂冈
zh.summary: 国务卿马克·鲁比奥访问了梵蒂冈，此时人们纷纷猜测他可能参加2028年总统竞选以接替特朗普总统。鲁比奥被视为共和党提名的热门人选，尽管副总统杰·德·万斯也被认为是可能的继任者。

title: FanDuel CEO Amy Howe is out after five years at the sportsbook
summary: Amy Howe is stepping down as CEO of FanDuel after five years leading the sportsbook. Her departure comes during rapid expansion in sports gambling and the emerging popularity of prediction markets.
content: Howe has overseen FanDuel during a time of dramatic expansion in sports gambling and as prediction markets have exploded in popularity.

zh.title: FanDuel首席执行官艾米·豪在任五年后离职
zh.summary: 艾米·豪在领导体育博彩平台FanDuel五年后宣布辞去首席执行官职位。她的离职适逢体育博彩快速扩张和预测市场兴起之时。

title: Zuckerberg’s ‘Multi Mark’ AI clone is a huge red flag for Meta shareholders
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's reported development of an AI clone called "Multi Mark" raises concerns among Meta shareholders about authentic leadership and accountability. Critics argue the technology represents evasion of responsibility rather than meaningful innovation.
content: Replacing authentic leadership with a digital doppelgänger isn’t innovation — it’s a high-tech retreat from accountability.

zh.title: 扎克伯格的"多元马克"AI克隆对Meta股东来说是巨大警示信号
zh.summary: 据报马克·扎克伯格正在开发一个名为"多元马克"的AI克隆，这在Meta股东中引发了对真正领导力和问责制的担忧。批评人士认为这项技术代表的是逃避责任而非有意义的创新。

title: There are plenty of reasons the dollar should be rallying right now — but it isn’t. That’s not a good sign.
summary: Despite multiple factors that typically support currency strength, the U.S. dollar has failed to rally, signaling potential economic weakness. Although the dollar has recovered to pre-Iran war levels, structural market changes underneath suggest broader concerns.
content: Although the dollar is back to where it was before the Iran war, a few things have changed under the surface.

zh.title: 美元现在有很多理由应该上升——但它没有。这不是好信号
zh.summary: 尽管有多个因素通常支持美元升值，但美元未能上升，这表明潜在的经济衰弱。虽然美元已恢复到伊朗战争前的水平，但底层的结构性市场变化表明存在更广泛的担忧。

title: Anthropic strikes SpaceX deal to fuel Claude Code growth — and for data centers in space
summary: Anthropic has partnered with SpaceX to expand its compute capacity and accelerate Claude Code growth, including plans for space-based data centers. The deal aims to increase capacity and lift usage rate limits on Anthropic's AI services.
content: Anthropic looks to expand its compute capacity with a SpaceX partnership that will lift rate limits on Claude Code.

zh.title: Anthropic与SpaceX达成协议推动Claude Code增长——以及太空数据中心
zh.summary: Anthropic与SpaceX合作扩大其计算容量并加速Claude Code增长，包括计划建立太空数据中心。该协议旨在增加容量并提高Anthropic AI服务的使用速率限制。

title: Want to tax the rich? Encourage them to keep spending ridiculous amounts of money on designer clothes.
summary: Luxury spending by wealthy consumers, particularly on designer clothing, could be leveraged through taxation policy to fund government programs. Many high-end fashion brands are publicly traded, offering investment opportunities tied to luxury consumer trends.
content: Many of the world’s most famous designer brands are traded on the stock market and are yours to buy a piece of.

zh.title: 想对富人征税？鼓励他们继续在设计师服装上花费荒谬的金额
zh.summary: 富人的奢侈消费，尤其是在设计师服装上的消费，可以通过税收政策为政府项目提供资金。许多高端时尚品牌是上市公司，提供与奢侈消费者趋势相关的投资机会。

title: Apple's R&D investments top 10% of sales as AI race creates 'sense of urgency'
summary: Apple's research and development spending has exceeded 10% of revenue for the first time in three decades, driven by the competitive AI race. R&D spending grew twice as fast as overall sales in the latest quarter, reflecting the company's technological priorities.
content: Apple’s R&D spending has crossed 10% of revenue for the first time in at least 30 years, and increased twice as fast as sales in the latest quarter.

zh.title: Apple的研发投资超过销售额的10%，AI竞争造成"紧迫感"
zh.summary: 苹果的研究和开发支出在三十年来首次超过收入的10%，由竞争激烈的AI竞争驱动。在最新季度，研发支出增长速度是总销售额增长速度的两倍，反映了该公司的技术优先事项。

title: Starbucks baristas tell us why the new $1,200 bonus is impossible to get
summary: Starbucks baristas report that the company's new $1,200 bonus program contains unrealistic performance targets that are difficult to achieve. The criticism highlights ongoing staffing challenges across many store locations.
content: Baristas tell MarketWatch that the company’s new goals are unrealistic, especially while stores face staffing problems.

zh.title: 星巴克咖啡师解释新的1200美元奖金为何难以获得
zh.summary: 星巴克咖啡师报告称该公司新的1200美元奖金计划包含难以实现的不切实际的绩效目标。这一批评突显了许多门店持续面临的员工配置挑战。

title: Elon Musk's Terafab chip factory in Texas could cost up to $119 billion, filing shows
summary: Elon Musk's proposed Terafab semiconductor manufacturing facility in Texas could exceed $119 billion in construction costs, according to company filings. The mega-factory aims to produce chips for Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI's operations.
content: Elon Musk's giant Terafab facility in Texas could cost up to $119 billion, with hopes of manufacturing chips for Tesla, SpaceX and xAI

zh.title: 文件显示马斯克的德州Terafab芯片工厂造价可能高达1190亿美元
zh.summary: 根据公司文件，埃隆·马斯克在得克萨斯州提议的Terafab半导体制造设施建设成本可能超过1190亿美元。该超大工厂旨在为特斯拉、SpaceX和xAI的运营生产芯片。

title: Car payments squeeze Americans as auto debt hits $1.68 trillion, report finds
summary: American auto debt has reached $1.68 trillion as consumers face higher vehicle prices, elevated interest rates, and longer loan terms. The mounting debt burden reflects structural challenges in the automotive market and consumer financial health.
content: Auto debt has swelled to $1.68 trillion, a new analysis finds. Americans face costlier vehicles, higher interest rates and lengthier loan terms.

zh.title: 随着汽车债务达到1.68万亿美元，汽车贷款支付对美国人的压力增大
zh.summary: 美国汽车债务已达到1.68万亿美元，因为消费者面临更高的车辆价格、更高的利率和更长的贷款期限。不断增加的债务负担反映了汽车市场和消费者财务健康中的结构性挑战。

title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
summary: Market traders are evenly divided on whether the SEC will eliminate quarterly earnings requirements, with most expecting any change would happen by early 2027. Such a regulatory shift would represent an unusually rapid transformation in corporate reporting standards.
content: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.

zh.title: 再见季度财报？交易员预测这一重大改变何时发生
zh.summary: 市场交易员在美证交会是否会取消季度财报要求上意见相左，大多数人预期任何变化都会在2027年初发生。这样的监管转变将代表公司报告标准的异常迅速的转变。

title: Anthropic, SpaceX announce compute deal that includes space development
summary: Anthropic and SpaceX have announced a compute partnership providing Anthropic access to SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center in Memphis, Tennessee. The deal includes plans for future space-based data center development to support Anthropic's growth.
content: Anthropic has signed a deal with SpaceX, which owns rival xAI, to use all of the compute capacity at the company’s Colossus 1 data center in Memphis, Tennessee.

zh.title: Anthropic和SpaceX宣布包括太空发展的计算合作交易
zh.summary: Anthropic和SpaceX宣布了一项计算合作伙伴关系，为Anthropic提供访问SpaceX位于田纳西州孟菲斯的Colossus 1数据中心的权限。该协议包括未来基于太空的数据中心开发计划，以支持Anthropic的增长。

title: ‘It’s money in the bank every week’: With gas prices over $4.50 a gallon, 7 EV drivers tell us they have no regrets
summary: Seven electric vehicle owners discuss their satisfaction with EV purchases, citing substantial fuel savings as gasoline prices exceed $4.50 per gallon. EV drivers report strong financial returns on their investments with no buyer's remorse despite higher upfront costs.
content: MarketWatch talked to electric-vehicle owners about the savings they’re seeing as gas prices soar.

zh.title: "每周都在存钱"：汽油价格超过每加仑4.50美元，7位电动车主坦言没有后悔
zh.summary: 七位电动汽车所有者讨论了他们对电动车购买的满意度，指出汽油价格超过每加仑4.50美元时的巨大燃油节省。电动车司机表示，尽管前期成本较高，但他们的投资获得了强劲的财务回报，没有任何买家遗憾。

title: Wearable patches: How Barrière is trying to disrupt the supplement industry
summary: Barrière is launching the first-ever lactose intolerance patch in 1,700 Walmart stores, marking entry into wearable supplement technology. This represents a shift in how consumers may access nutritional interventions through non-traditional delivery methods.
content: Supplement patch company Barrière is launching the first-ever lactose intolerance patch in 1,700 Walmart stores, the company told CNBC exclusively.

zh.title: 可穿戴贴片：Barrière如何试图颠覆补充剂行业
zh.summary: Barrière正在1,700家沃尔玛门店推出首个乳糖不耐受贴片，标志着进入可穿戴补充技术领域。这代表了消费者通过非传统给药方式获取营养干预手段的方式转变。

title: The ‘sugar high’ is over: Why the first sell signal for stocks since 2021 is now flashing, according to this Wall Street bank
summary: Wells Fargo strategists have identified the first sell signal for stocks since 2021, citing factors that have been driving market gains are now exhausted. This technical indicator suggests potential headwinds for equity market performance going forward.
content: Wells Fargo strategists say some factors that have been driving the market higher are played out.

zh.title: "糖分高峰"已过：自2021年以来首个股票卖出信号现已出现，据华尔街银行分析
zh.summary: 富国银行策略师已确定了自2021年以来首个股票卖出信号，指出驱动市场上升的因素已耗尽。该技术指标表明股票市场表现可能面临阻力。

title: Disney pops 4% after streaming, parks drive revenue beat in first report under CEO Josh D'Amaro
summary: Disney exceeded analyst revenue expectations in its fiscal second-quarter earnings, with streaming and parks operations performing strongly. This positive result marks the company's first earnings report under new CEO Josh D'Amaro.
content: Disney revenue topped analyst expectations when the media giant reported its fiscal second-quarter earnings on Wednesday.

zh.title: 迪士尼在流媒体和园区推动收入超预期后上升4%，新首席执行官乔希·达马罗时代的首份报告
zh.summary: 迪士尼在财政第二季度财报中超过了分析师的收入预期，流媒体和园区业务表现强劲。这个积极结果标志着该公司在新首席执行官乔希·达马罗领导下的首份财报。

title: You’re thinking too small in a world of ‘infinite capital,’ according to this billionaire’s business-building blueprint
summary: Brad Jacobs, who has built eight multibillion-dollar companies, outlines his repeatable methodology for achieving massive financial returns. His blueprint suggests entrepreneurs should pursue larger-scale opportunities in an environment of abundant capital.
content: Brad Jacobs, who has constructed eight multibillion-dollar companies, reveals his repeatable process for massive returns.

zh.title: 根据这位亿万富豪的商业建构蓝图，你在"无限资本"的世界中想得太小了
zh.summary: 建立了八家数十亿美元公司的布拉德·雅各布斯阐述了他实现巨额财务回报的可重复方法论。他的蓝图建议企业家在资本充沛的环境中追求更大规模的机遇。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, AMD, Palantir, Monster Beverage, Alphabet, Meta, Sphere Entertainment & more
summary: Wall Street analysts released significant recommendations on major tech and consumer stocks including Nvidia, AMD, Meta, and others on Wednesday. These calls reflect shifting market sentiment across the semiconductor, advertising, and entertainment sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

zh.title: 以下是周三最大的分析师评级：英伟达、AMD、Palantir、Monster Beverage、Alphabet、Meta、Sphere Entertainment 等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周三对包括英伟达、AMD、Meta 等主要科技和消费股票发布了重要建议。这些评级反映了半导体、广告和娱乐行业市场情绪的转变。

title: FDA announces its first approval of fruit-flavored e-cigarettes for adults in major shift under Trump
summary: The FDA has authorized fruit-flavored e-cigarettes for adult smokers for the first time, representing a significant policy shift in the current administration. This approval marks a departure from previous restrictions on flavored nicotine products.
content: The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday announced its first authorization of fruit-flavored electronic cigarettes intended for adult smokers.

zh.title: FDA 宣布首次批准成人使用果味电子烟，特朗普政府下的重大政策转变
zh.summary: FDA 首次为成人吸烟者授权果味电子烟，代表当前政府的重大政策转变。这项批准标志着对调味烟草产品的先前限制的改变。

title: Nvidia, Corning partner on massive optical fiber deal that may be a game changer for AI
summary: Corning is establishing three new advanced manufacturing plants in the U.S. exclusively for Nvidia's optical fiber technology needs. This partnership addresses critical infrastructure demands for AI and data center operations.
content: Corning is opening three new advanced manufacturing plants in the U.S. dedicated entirely to optical technologies for Nvidia.

zh.title: Nvidia与康宁在大规模光纤交易中合作，可能改变AI格局
zh.summary: 康宁在美国建立三个新的先进制造工厂，专门用于英伟达的光纤技术需求。这一伙伴关系满足了人工智能和数据中心运营的关键基础设施需求。

title: Airlines cut 13,000 flights in May as jet fuel prices soar
summary: Airlines have reduced nearly two million seats across flights in May as rising jet fuel costs pressure margins. The flight cuts reflect airlines' attempts to manage profitability amid elevated energy prices.
content: Airlines have removed nearly two million seats from flights over the month, data from Cirium shows.

zh.title: 随着喷气燃料价格飙升，航空公司在5月削减13,000班航班
zh.summary: 由于喷气燃料成本上升挤压利润，航空公司在5月减少了近两百万个航班座位。这些航班削减反映了航空公司在能源价格高企情况下管理盈利能力的努力。

title: ADP says businesses create the most new jobs in 15 months. Labor market might be thawing.
summary: U.S. businesses added 109,000 new jobs in April according to ADP data, marking the largest increase in 15 months. This suggests the labor market may be recovering after a period of weak hiring activity.
content: ADP said U.S. businesses create 109,000 new jobs in April — the biggest increase in 15 months — in a sign a partly frozen labor market might be thawing out after a prolonged bout of tepid hiring.

zh.title: ADP表示企业创造15个月来最多的新就业机会。劳动力市场可能正在复苏。
zh.summary: 根据ADP数据，美国企业在4月增加了109,000个新工作岗位，创造了15个月来最大增幅。这表明劳动力市场可能在经历一段招聘疲软后正在恢复。

title: AMD’s stock soars toward best postearnings gain in 7 years: ‘The world has changed’
summary: AMD stock is experiencing its strongest post-earnings rally in seven years as investors shift focus to the company's CPU momentum. The surge reflects renewed investor confidence in AMD's competitive position.
content: AMD investors are paying more attention to CPU momentum than they were recently.

zh.title: AMD股价创7年来最强财报后涨幅："世界已改变"
zh.summary: AMD股票正经历7年来最强劲的财报后上涨，投资者重新关注该公司的CPU势头。这种上涨反映了投资者对AMD竞争地位的重新信心。

title: Dow futures surge 500 points as oil dives on Iran deal progress, AMD jumps: Live updates
summary: Markets reached new intraday and closing highs as oil prices declined on progress toward an Iran nuclear deal and AMD posted strong earnings. The combination of geopolitical optimism and tech sector strength drove broad market gains.
content: Buoyed by solid earnings and lower oil prices, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both reached new intraday and closing highs on Tuesday.

zh.title: 道指期货攀升500点，油价因伊朗协议进展下跌，AMD飙升：实时更新
zh.summary: 由于伊朗核协议取得进展导致油价下跌，AMD公布强劲业绩，市场创造了新的盘中和收盘高点。地缘政治乐观情绪和科技板块强势的结合推动了市场广泛上涨。

title: Private payrolls rose by 109,000 in April, topping expectations, ADP says
summary: ADP reported private payroll growth of 109,000 in April, exceeding analyst expectations and signaling labor market stability. The data suggests reduced likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate cuts in the near term.
content: The report provided more evidence of a stable labor market and less incentive for the Fed to lower interest rates.

zh.title: ADP数据：4月私人薪资增加109,000个，超过预期
zh.summary: ADP报告4月私人薪资增长109,000个，超过分析师预期，表明劳动力市场保持稳定。该数据表明美联储在近期内降息的可能性降低。

title: Trump says Iran will be bombed 'at much higher level' if they don't agree to peace deal
summary: President Trump warned Iran of escalated military action if negotiations over a peace deal are not resolved within the next 48 hours. Washington is reportedly awaiting Tehran's response on several critical negotiating points.
content: Washington reportedly expects responses from Tehran on several key points within the next 48 hours.

zh.title: 特朗普表示如果伊朗不同意和平协议，将被轰炸"更高层级"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统警告伊朗，如果和平协议谈判在未来48小时内没有解决，将面临升级的军事行动。据报道，华盛顿正在等待德黑兰对几个关键谈判要点的回应。

title: Uber pops 10% as company issues higher-than-expected bookings guidance
summary: Uber's stock surged 10% following better-than-expected bookings guidance, despite taking a $1.5 billion hit in Q1 2026 from equity investment revaluations. The positive outlook offset concerns about investment losses.
content: Uber said its net income took a $1.5 billion hit in the first quarter of 2026 due to the revaluation of the company's equity investments.

zh.title: 优步股价上涨10%，公司发布高于预期的预订指引
zh.summary: 优步股价在发布超预期预订指引后上涨10%，尽管该公司在2026年第一季度因股权投资重估受到15亿美元的打击。积极的前景抵消了人们对投资亏损的担忧。

title: Why did Paddington Bear need a police escort?
summary: BBC reports on crime-related stories including a documentary investigation exposing scammers exploiting dogs to defraud animal lovers and an analysis of retail locations used by organized crime. The segment also covers an unusual incident requiring police protection for Paddington Bear.
content:
Rav Wilding joins us with the latest crime headlines.

From a shocking BBC investigation exposing scammers abusing dogs to con animal lovers, to how to spot a shop used by organised crime — plus why Paddington Bear needed a police escort

zh.title: 帕丁顿熊为什么需要警察护送？
zh.summary: BBC报道了与犯罪相关的故事，包括一项纪录片调查，揭露骗子利用狗来欺诈动物爱好者，以及对有组织犯罪使用的零售地点的分析。该片段还报道了一起不寻常的事件，要求为帕丁顿熊提供警察保护。

title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: It's not the 1970s, but the oil shock is still biting hard
summary: The UK faces significant impacts from rising energy prices despite theoretical insulation compared to global peers. This demonstrates how oil shocks continue to strain developed economies even with diversified energy sources.
content: In theory, the U.K. should be less exposed to the impact of higher energy prices than some peers. In practice, the price surge is having a dire impact.

zh.title: CNBC英国交易所通讯：不是1970年代，但油价冲击仍在持续伤害
zh.summary: 尽管理论上相比全球同行有隔离效应，英国仍面临能源价格上升的重大影响。这表明油价冲击即使在能源来源多样化的情况下，仍继续对发达经济体造成压力。

title: Wegovy pill sales smash forecasts after launch as Novo Nordisk hikes guidance
summary: Novo Nordisk's newly launched Wegovy pill has exceeded sales forecasts in early market performance. The strong results prompted the company to raise its 2026 financial guidance.
content: Novo Nordisk raised its outlook for 2026 after a strong performance from its newly launched Wegovy pill.

zh.title: Wegovy药丸销售在推出后超预期，诺和诺德提高指导预期
zh.summary: 诺和诺德新推出的Wegovy药丸在早期市场表现中超过了销售预期。强劲的成果促使该公司提高了2026年的财务指导。

title: Private credit’s $2 trillion boom raises global stability fears, watchdog warns
summary: The Financial Stability Board warns that the $2 trillion private credit boom poses emerging systemic risks requiring stronger regulatory oversight. The growth in unregulated lending channels is intensifying concerns about financial stability.
content: The Financial Stability Board wants regulators to tighten up their supervision of private credit amid fears of growing stress in the sector.

zh.title: 私人信贷2万亿美元繁荣引发全球稳定性担忧，监管机构警告
zh.summary: 金融稳定委员会警告，2万亿美元私人信贷繁荣带来新兴的系统性风险，需要更强的监管监督。不受监管的借贷渠道增长加强了对金融稳定的担忧。

title: Lufthansa faces nearly $2 billion in extra fuel costs amid Middle East conflict
summary: Germany's Lufthansa airline is absorbing nearly $2 billion in additional fuel costs due to Middle East regional instability. The conflict presents substantial operational and financial challenges for the carrier.
content: Germany's largest airline, Lufthansa, is taking on additional fuel costs as the Middle East conflict poses 'enormous challenges.'

zh.title: 中东冲突中汉莎航空面临近20亿美元燃料成本增加
zh.summary: 德国汉莎航空公司由于中东地区局势不稳定而承担近20亿美元的额外燃料成本。这场冲突对该航空公司的运营和财务构成了重大挑战。

title: Oil prices fall as Trump pauses Hormuz escort effort
summary: Oil prices fell after President Trump announced the U.S. would pause naval escort operations in the Strait of Hormuz. The move signals potential diplomatic progress toward a U.S.-Iran agreement.
content: Oil prices fell after Trump said the U.S. would pause its naval escort endeavor in the Strait of Hormuz, raising hopes of a potential deal with Iran.

zh.title: 油价下跌，特朗普暂停霍尔木兹护航行动
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统宣布美国将暂停在霍尔木兹海峡的海军护航行动后，油价下跌。这一举措预示着朝着美国与伊朗协议迈进的潜在外交进展。

title: China hosts Iran's top diplomat just days ahead of Trump's high-stakes visit
summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is visiting Beijing in his first trip to China since the Iran war began. The diplomatic engagement occurs days before Trump's scheduled high-stakes visit.
content: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi trip to Beijing on Wednesday marks the first time he has visited China since the beginning of the Iran war.

zh.title: 中国在特朗普高风险访华前数日接待伊朗最高外交官
zh.summary: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇正在访问北京，这是伊朗战争开始以来他首次访华。这一外交活动发生在特朗普计划中的高风险访华前几天。

title: Border politics - how similar jobs in the same firm deliver different tax bills
summary: Workers in identical positions at the same company face significantly different tax bills depending on whether they work in Scotland or England. The border creates substantial tax disparities for equivalent employment.
content: Workers in southern Scotland can find themselves paying more tax than colleagues who live south of the border.

zh.title: 边境政治 - 同一公司相似工作如何导致不同的税单
zh.summary: 同一公司担任相同职位的员工根据在苏格兰或英格兰工作而面临明显不同的税单。边境对同等就业造成了巨大的税收差异。

title: 'I have to make my own dog food' - voters counting living costs on eve of election
summary: British voters face mounting cost-of-living pressures, resorting to extreme measures such as homemade pet food and monthly meal batch-cooking. The financial strain underscores public anxiety ahead of elections.
content: India Lerigo makes her own dog food and batch cooks a month's worth of meals over a weekend to save money.

zh.title: "我必须自己制作狗粮" - 选民在选举前夕计算生活成本
zh.summary: 英国选民面临日益加重的生活成本压力，采取极端措施如自制宠物食品和每月批量做饭。财务压力凸显了选举前公众的焦虑。

title: The baby bank helping struggling parents cope
summary: Little Village reports serving nearly one-third more families in need than in previous years. The surge in demand reflects growing financial hardship among parents seeking assistance.
content: Little Village says it is helping nearly one third more families in need than in previous years.

zh.title: 帮助困难中的父母应对的婴儿银行
zh.summary: Little Village报告服务的需要帮助的家庭比往年增加近三分之一。需求激增反映了寻求协助的父母日益加重的财务困难。

title: In the global AI race, a sanctioned Chinese firm says cheaper models can still win
summary: SenseTime, a sanctioned Chinese AI firm, is pursuing cheaper multimodal models and international expansion to remain competitive. The strategy aims to challenge global competitors despite regulatory constraints.
content: As China’s AI competition intensifies, SenseTime is shifting toward multimodal AI, lower-cost models and overseas expansion to remain competitive, co-founder Lin Dahua said.

zh.title: 全球AI竞赛中，一家受制裁的中国公司表示廉价模型仍能赢
zh.summary: 受制裁的中国AI公司商汤科技正在追求更便宜的多模态模型和国际扩张以保持竞争力。该战略旨在尽管面临监管限制仍能挑战全球竞争对手。

title: Cathedral to help run food share scheme in city
summary: Hereford Cathedral is providing operational support to expand a local food-sharing initiative. The partnership addresses growing community food assistance needs.
content: Hereford Cathedral says it will provide operational support to help the "incredible volunteers".

zh.title: 大教堂帮助运营城市食品共享计划
zh.summary: 赫里福德大教堂正在提供运营支持以扩展本地食品共享计划。该伙伴关系解决了日益增长的社区食品援助需求。

title: Samsung crossses $1 trillion valuation as AI frenzy drives historic rally, lifting shares over 15%
summary: Samsung has achieved a historic $1 trillion valuation driven by AI investor enthusiasm, with shares surging over 15 percent. The rally follows an eight-fold jump in first-quarter operating profits.
content: The rally comes after the company reported an over eightfold increase in first-quarter operating profits last week.

zh.title: 三星突破1万亿美元估值，AI热潮推动历史性涨幅，股价上升超15%
zh.summary: 三星在AI投资者热情的推动下达到历史性的1万亿美元估值，股价上升超过15%。这次涨幅是在第一季度营业利润增长8倍之后。

title: Oil prices ease as US pauses Project Freedom to seek deal with Iran
summary: Oil prices eased after Trump announced a pause to U.S. naval operations in the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a potential path to U.S.-Iran negotiations. The move follows days of rising regional tensions.
content: President Donald Trump raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.

zh.title: 美国暂停"自由行动"计划寻求与伊朗协议，油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布暂停美国海军在霍尔木兹海峡的行动后，油价下跌，预示着美伊谈判可能的道路。此举发生在区域紧张局势升级的数天之后。

title: Ken Griffin: We will create jobs in Miami as a consequence of NYC Mayor Mamdani's wealth tax video
summary: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin countered New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's wealth tax proposal by pledging Miami job creation instead. The clash reflects mounting tensions between wealthy executives and municipal tax initiatives.
content: Ken Griffin, CEO of Citadel, reacts to New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's push to tax the rich, including a video filmed outside of Griffin's Manhattan apartment.

zh.title: 肯·格里芬：作为对纽约市市长曼达尼财富税的回应，我们将在迈阿密创造就业机会
zh.summary: 城堡资本首席执行官肯·格里芬通过承诺在迈阿密创造就业机会来回应纽约市市长佐兰·曼达尼的财富税提案。这次冲突反映了富有高管与市政税收倡议之间日益紧张的关系。

title: Astera Labs’ stock climbs as the company strives to make AI chips more powerful
summary: Astera Labs' stock is rising as the company works to develop more powerful AI chips, supported by upbeat earnings results. The connectivity company's strong performance reflects investor confidence in its AI chip advancement capabilities.
content: The connectivity company also issued upbeat earnings results

zh.title: Astera Labs股价上升，公司致力于开发更强大的AI芯片
zh.summary: Astera Labs股价随着公司开发更强大的AI芯片而上升，由乐观的财务业绩支撑。这家连接公司的强劲表现反映了投资者对其AI芯片先进能力的信心。

title: Super Micro’s stock surges as Wall Street cheers its margin recovery
summary: Super Micro's stock surged 18% as investors celebrated the company's margin recovery, overlooking a revenue shortfall. The AI server maker's gross margin improvement signals potential profitability gains despite missing revenue expectations.
content: Shares of the AI server maker jumped 18% as investors shrugged off a revenue miss and celebrated a rebound in gross margins.

zh.title: 超微股价飙升，华尔街为其利润率恢复欢呼
zh.summary: 超微股价上升18%，投资者庆祝公司利润率恢复，忽视了收入不足。这家AI服务器制造商的毛利率改善预示着潜在的利润增长，尽管未达到收入预期。

title: Upstart’s stock is getting punished after earnings. Here’s the big gripe.
summary: Upstart's stock fell after the AI lending company missed a key profit metric in its earnings report. The company's CEO attributed the shortfall to analyst mismodeling of seasonal trends rather than fundamental business weakness.
content: The AI lending company came up short on a key profit metric, but its CEO says that analysts may have mismodeled seasonal trends.

zh.title: Upstart股价在财报后受挫。这是主要投诉。
zh.summary: AI借贷公司Upstart的股价在错过关键利润指标后下跌。公司CEO将不足归因于分析师对季节性趋势的误估，而非业务基本面衰弱。

title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
summary: Apple will pay up to $95 per U.S. iPhone customer to settle a lawsuit over misleading Apple Intelligence advertising claims. The settlement addresses allegations that marketing misrepresented AI capabilities to consumers.
content: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

zh.title: 苹果因人工智能诉讼向美国iPhone购买者支付最高95美元
zh.summary: 苹果将支付每位美国iPhone客户最高95美元来解决关于误导性Apple Intelligence广告宣传的诉讼。该和解针对营销向消费者虚假陈述人工智能能力的指控。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Major U.S. stock indices reached record highs on Tuesday, driven by declining oil prices and strong corporate earnings across sectors. This momentum sets the stage for continued market gains in the upcoming trading session.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh records on Tuesday, powered by falling oil prices and solid quarterly earnings reports.

zh.title: 周三的大股票故事：下个交易日可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 美国主要股票指数周二创历史新高，受油价下跌和各行业强劲企业盈利驱动。这种势头为即将到来的交易日的持续市场涨幅奠定了基础。
